case_title: D'ANGELO FABRIZIO et al VS HARDISON PERRY IND/DBA MODERINI INTERIOR DESIGN et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY D'ANGELO FABRIZIO D'ANGELO SUZANNE AS TO DEFENDANT HARDISON PERRY IND/DBA MODERINI INTERIOR DESIGN SNAIDERO INTERNATIONAL USA INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-27-1996 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HARDISON PERRY IND/DBA MODERINI INTERIOR DESIGN
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-27-1996, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO APR-17-1996 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
INVALID POS. POSITION OF PERSON PAPERS WERE LEFT WITH NOT INDICATED.
INVALID POS; TITLE/POSITION OF DINO TADDIO NOT INDICATED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF D'ANGELO FABRIZIO D'ANGELO SUZANNE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HARDISON PERRY IND/DBA MODERINI INTERIOR DESIGN $506.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $546.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
IN ADDITION TO MONEY DAMAGES;THE PARTIES HAVE AGREED, & THE COURT ORDERS THAT ALL GOODS ORDERED BY PLTF FROM DEFT HARDISON & MODERINI WHICH HAVE
NOT BEEN DELIVERED TO PLTF, WILL BE DELIVERED ON 4/17/96.DEFT SNAIDERO IS DISMISSED FROM THIS ACTION.
LTR. BY PLNTF;D'ANGELO FILED AND ENTERED IN COURT.
